blocks.content: The Henderson property had been sitting empty for three years. Before that it had belonged to a family named Henderson — apparently — though no one seemed to know much about them except that they'd left in a hurry and left behind a house, a barn, and a rusted-out pickup truck sitting in the side yard collecting rain and opinions.

The town had put up a chain-link fence with a condemned sign on it after the second time neighborhood kids got in. The fence had, in theory, resolved the situation. In practice it had increased traffic by about forty percent.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I heard there's still stuff in the barn. Old stuff. Equipment. One of the Crenshaw twins said there's a whole saddle in there.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Why would there be a saddle.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Horses, probably.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: There are no horses on the Henderson property.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: There were probably horses at some point.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Then where did they—
She stopped.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I'm not asking this question.

They were all sitting on the wall now — Kit, Eli, Savannah, Daisy — in the particular configuration of kids with nowhere to be and too much morning ahead of them. Kit had gone quiet, which was a different thing from not paying attention. He was looking east, toward where the top of the old water tower was visible over the tree line. The town had put up a new one six years ago. The old one just sat there.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What about the water tower.
Everyone looked at him.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: The old one. You climb it, you can see the whole town.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You can also fall off it and not see anything ever again.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: There are rungs.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: There are rusted rungs.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Rungs are rungs.
Daisy looked at him for a long moment. Then she looked at Savannah. Savannah was already pulling her hair back into a ponytail, which was essentially agreement.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: If one of us gets tetanus, I want it noted that I said rusted rungs.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Noted.
They got on their bikes.
